_description: Mobile template: file a new operational gap via async inbox dispatch.
_usage: POST /inbox/enqueue with prompt field populated from this template.

payload.prompt:
File a new gap with the following details:

- ID: auto
- Type: <stale-ssot|missing-entry|agent-behavior|unclear-doc|duplicate-truth|runtime-bug>
- Severity: <low|medium|high|critical>
- Description: <one-line description of the gap>
- Discovered by: <session or agent name>
- Parent loop: <LOOP-NAME or null>

Use gaps.file with --id auto. Confirm the gap was filed and report the assigned ID.

example_filled.prompt:
File a new gap with the following details:

- ID: auto
- Type: missing-entry
- Severity: medium
- Description: Mobile dashboard missing receipts.summary in cap allowlist
- Discovered by: mobile-session-20260302
- Parent loop: LOOP-MOBILE-COMMAND-CENTER-20260302

Use gaps.file with --id auto. Confirm the gap was filed and report the assigned ID.
